top3.sql:
SELECT buildUpPlayPassingClass, chanceCreationPassingClass
FROM Team_Attributes
WHERE team_api_id = (SELECT team_api_id FROM Team WHERE team_long_name = 'PEC Zwolle')
AND date = '2013-09-20';

SELECT chanceCreationPassingClass
FROM Team_Attributes
WHERE team_api_id = (SELECT team_api_id FROM Team WHERE team_long_name = 'PEC Zwolle')
  AND date = '2013-09-20';

SELECT buildUpPlayPassingClass, chanceCreationPassingClass
FROM Team_Attributes
WHERE team_api_id = (SELECT team_api_id FROM Team WHERE team_long_name = 'PEC Zwolle')
AND date = '2013-09-20';

SELECT chanceCreationPassingClass
FROM Team_Attributes
WHERE team_api_id = (SELECT team_api_id FROM Team WHERE team_long_name = 'PEC Zwolle')
  AND date = '2013-09-20';

SELECT buildUpPlayPassingClass, chanceCreationPassingClass
FROM Team_Attributes
WHERE team_api_id = (SELECT team_api_id FROM Team WHERE team_long_name = 'PEC Zwolle')
AND date = '2013-09-20';

SELECT chanceCreationPassingClass
FROM Team_Attributes ta
JOIN Team t ON ta.team_api_id = t.team_api_id
WHERE t.team_long_name = 'PEC Zwolle'
  AND ta.date = '2013-09-20';

SELECT chanceCreationPassingClass
FROM Team_Attributes
WHERE team_api_id = (SELECT team_api_id FROM Team WHERE team_long_name = 'PEC Zwolle')
  AND date = '2013-09-20';

final.sql:
SELECT buildUpPlayPassingClass, chanceCreationPassingClass
FROM Team_Attributes
WHERE team_api_id = (SELECT team_api_id FROM Team WHERE team_long_name = 'PEC Zwolle')
AND date = '2013-09-20';
